income_thresholds.description: Family annual income should be below Rs 8 lakh. SC/ST/BPL/PM-JAY beneficiaries are automatically eligible regardless of income.
income_thresholds.source: Ministry of Women and Child Development / PMMVY 2.0 Guidelines

exclusion_rules.description: Pregnant woman must be at least 19 years of age
Women employed in central/state government or PSUs are NOT eligible as they receive maternity benefits from their employer
Women already receiving maternity benefits under any other law (e.g., Maternity Benefit Act, ESI Act) are NOT eligible
Under PMMVY 2.0: First child gets Rs 5000. Second child ONLY if it is a girl child (Rs 6000). Third and subsequent children not eligible.
Family income must be below Rs 8 lakh unless the woman belongs to SC/ST/BPL/PM-JAY beneficiary category

family_criteria.family_definition: Benefit is to the pregnant/lactating woman. First child: Rs 5000 in 3 installments. Second child (ONLY if girl): Rs 6000 in 2 installments. SC/ST/BPL/PM-JAY beneficiaries eligible regardless of income.

covered_procedures: First child: Rs 5000 cash benefit in 3 installments via DBT
Installment 1: Rs 3000 after early pregnancy registration (within 150 days of LMP)
Installment 2: Rs 2000 after at least one ANC checkup (after 6 months of pregnancy)
Second child (girl only): Rs 6000 in single installment after birth registration
Additional Rs 1000 JSY benefit for institutional delivery (claimed separately)
Partial wage compensation for pregnant and lactating mothers
Nutritional support to improve health of mother and child
excluded_procedures: Medical treatment costs (this is a CASH BENEFIT scheme, not insurance)
Hospitalization expenses (covered under PM-JAY or JSSK separately)
Second child if not a girl (under PMMVY 2.0)
Government/PSU employees who receive employer maternity benefits
Women receiving maternity benefits under any other law

required_documents.name: Aadhaar Card
required_documents.notes: Required for DBT payment and identity verification

required_documents.name: Bank Account (Aadhaar-linked)
required_documents.notes: For receiving cash benefit via Direct Benefit Transfer

required_documents.name: MCH Card / ANC Registration
required_documents.notes: Mother and Child Health card showing pregnancy registration date and ANC visits

required_documents.name: LMP Certificate / Pregnancy Confirmation
required_documents.local_name_hi: अंतिम मासिक धर्म प्रमाण / गर्भावस्था पुष्टि
required_documents.notes: For verifying early registration within 150 days of Last Menstrual Period

required_documents.name: SC/ST/BPL Certificate
required_documents.notes: Required only if claiming eligibility through SC/ST/BPL/PM-JAY category (bypasses income ceiling)

required_documents.name: Child Birth Registration Certificate
alternatives: Hospital Discharge Summary with child details
required_documents.local_name_hi: बच्चे का जन्म पंजीकरण प्रमाण पत्र
required_documents.notes: Required for second child (girl) benefit of Rs 6000

enrollment_channels: Sub-Centre or Primary Health Centre through ANM/ASHA
Block/District Programme Officer (Women and Child Development)
enrollment_steps: Step 1: Register pregnancy early (within 150 days of LMP) at Anganwadi Centre, PHC, or online
Step 2: Fill PMMVY application form (Form 1A) with Aadhaar, bank details, and MCH card
Step 3: Anganwadi worker or ANM verifies and enters application in PMMVY-CAS portal
Step 4: First installment of Rs 3000 credited to bank account after early registration verification
Step 5: Complete at least one ante-natal checkup after 6 months of pregnancy
Step 6: Submit Form 1B with ANC proof; second installment of Rs 2000 credited
Step 7: For second child (girl only): submit Form 2A with birth registration after delivery
Step 8: Second child benefit of Rs 6000 credited in single installment after verification
description_for_embedding: Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana (PMMVY) is a central government maternity benefit scheme providing cash assistance via DBT to pregnant and lactating women. For the first child, Rs 5000 is paid in 3 installments (Rs 3000 at early registration + Rs 2000 after ANC). For the second child ONLY if it is a girl, Rs 6000 is paid in a single installment. Women must be 19+ years old and NOT government/PSU employees. Family income below Rs 8 lakh, but SC/ST/BPL/PM-JAY beneficiaries are eligible regardless of income. This is a cash benefit for nutrition and wage compensation, not medical insurance.
